scripts.api:dev: npm run build -w @larry/shared && npm run build -w @larry/config && npm run build -w @larry/db && npm run build -w @larry/ai && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed && npm run dev -w @larry/api
scripts.api:build: npm run build -w @larry/shared && npm run build -w @larry/config && npm run build -w @larry/db && npm run build -w @larry/ai && npm run build -w @larry/api
scripts.api:test: npm run build -w @larry/shared && npm run build -w @larry/config && npm run build -w @larry/db && npm run build -w @larry/ai && npm run test -w @larry/api
scripts.worker:build: npm run build -w @larry/shared && npm run build -w @larry/config && npm run build -w @larry/db && npm run build -w @larry/ai && npm run build -w @larry/worker
scripts.worker:test: npm run build -w @larry/shared && npm run build -w @larry/config && npm run build -w @larry/db && npm run build -w @larry/ai && npm run test -w @larry/worker
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d && sleep 3 && npm run db:setup
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build -w @larry/shared && npm run build -w @larry/web
